borrow.title: Scan Borrow
borrow.description: Scan HT barcode or enter HT code manually to borrow.
borrow.errorAlreadyBorrowed: This HT is already borrowed and cannot be borrowed again.

return.title: Scan Return
return.description: Scan HT barcode or enter HT code manually to return.
return.errorNotBorrowed: This HT is not currently borrowed.

scanner.title: Scan Barcode
scanner.permissionDenied: Camera access denied. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
scanner.viewfinderHint: Press the button below to start the camera

detail.htInfoDescription: Details of the HT to be borrowed.

tips.title: Usage Tips
tips.tip1: Make sure the HT barcode is clearly visible in front of the camera.
tips.tip2: Use manual input if the barcode cannot be read.
tips.tip3: An HT that is currently borrowed cannot be borrowed again.
tips.returnTip: Select the HT condition upon return (Good, Light Damage, Heavy Damage, Lost, etc).

empty.borrowDescription: Scan an HT barcode or enter a code manually in the left panel to start borrowing.
empty.returnDescription: Scan an HT barcode or enter a code manually in the left panel to process a return.

history.title: Transaction Log History
history.description: Complete list of borrowing and returning history of HT units.
